input.memoryNote: You didn't notice both weddings were on the same day until six weeks in. By then both brides called you 'the best friend.' You built a schedule. Packed snacks for the Uber between venues. Changed bridesmaid dresses in the car. Gave the second speech from memory because you left the notes at venue one. It was better. You were already crying when you started. The groom cried too. You barely knew him.

meta.tiktokHook: My sister was accidentally a bridesmaid at two weddings on the same day. She changed in the Uber. She cried at both. The groom at the second one cried too. She barely knew him.
meta.caption: queen of showing up fully, no matter what
meta.whyItWorks: 'The groom cried and she barely knew him' is the perfect absurd kicker. Has a story arc with a real punchline — rare. High TikTok completion rate.
